body.title: Wire self_test.py consolidate_content(): runtime behavioral regression detection
body.result: Replaced Gemini stubs with graph-native: _generate_questions_from_graph() (key term extraction + cortex search, no LLM), _grade_answer() (Jaccard word-overlap), _store_miss_rate_to_experiential() (EXPERIENTIAL memory for observer). Added SelfTestSource to push_sources.py: 15min timer scans blob_index for untested items, runs consolidate_content(), pushes LEARNING_GAP to TWM if miss_rate > 50%.
body.description: self_test.py consolidate_content() returns [] — Q&A loop scaffolding with no execution. Igor has zero continuous self-monitoring at runtime. Fix: implement _generate_questions() using cortex graph traversal (no LLM), _grade_answers() via embedding similarity, wire as background daemon triggered post-reading and post-sprint. Log miss rates to EXPERIENTIAL memory so observer can surface learning_gap signal. Test-finding from deep-audit Panel 7.
